CustomField.formula: IF( OR( ISBLANK( mfg_Daily_Demand_Units_Per_Day__c ), mfg_Daily_Demand_Units_Per_Day__c <= 0 ), 0, CEILING(mfg_Daily_Demand_Units_Per_Day__c * 0.20) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Maintains additional inventory to absorb demand fluctuations and avoid stock-outs. Rounds the value up to ensure the safety buffer is always adequate.
CustomField.label: Safety Stock (Units)
